top_signals.title: China’s Hardware Tech Stocks Look to Earnings to Sustain Rally
top_signals.summary: Chinese hardware technology stocks have been on a tear. The next challenge is showing the earnings to back it up.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BHP’s Incoming CEO Craig Tweaks Leadership Team Before Start
top_signals.summary: BHP Group’s incoming Chief Executive Officer Brandon Craig has announced changes to the company’s leadership team before he officially assumes the role on July 1.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Apple Supplier Lingyi Set for HK Debut After $1.1 Billion Float
top_signals.summary: Lingyi iTech Guangdong Co. a Chinese maker of electronic devices, is set to begin trading in Hong Kong on Friday after raising HK$8.3 billion ($1.06 billion) in a share sale, part of the city’s busiest month for listings this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Microsoft lifts price of Xbox consoles due to soaring component costs
top_signals.summary: Microsoft said it's increasing the price of Xbox game consoles after Apple announced price hikes for MacBooks and iPads.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Amazon adds new funding, lifting India AI and cloud investment to $48 billion
top_signals.summary: Amazon announces fresh investment of $13 billion to expand AI and cloud infrastructure in India, taking its total investment to $48 billion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Despite Trump trade rhetoric, Asian investors keep betting on U.S.: Former House Majority Leader Eric Cantor
top_signals.summary: Cantor said that investment flows still have "so much" allocation to the U.S., because investors recognise that the country was still one with a "rule of law."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: South Korea’s IPO bust clouds equity markets as Chaebol structure restrains listings
top_signals.summary: South Korea's IPO activity has lagged that of its regional peers as the structure of the market and governance reforms collide.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: H.B. Fuller Agrees to Acquire UK-Listed AMS for £659 Million
top_signals.summary: H.B. Fuller Co. agreed to acquire Advanced Medical Solutions Group Plc, a British maker of tissue-healing medical products, for £659 million ($870 million).

top_signals.title: Ghosn says calls for his Nissan return show investor anger over results
top_signals.summary: Ghosn led Nissan for nearly two decades and has lived in Lebanon since fleeing Japan in late 2019.
